votes.title: Supplemental appropriation resolution ($4,600,000 Transform 66 Outside the Beltway Concession Funding for George Snyder Trail)
votes.notes: Tie vote = fails. Failed for lack of 4 votes needed.

votes.title: Resolution to cancel George Snyder Trail Project (VDOT UPC 112816)
